---
title: "Choosing a Ground Station"
id: material-fw-6
order: 92
summary: "A high-level overview of available Ground Control Stations (GCS) with links for choosing an appropriate tool."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
Goals:
  - module-goals-fw
activities:
  - activity-fw-11
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/material-fw-6.md"
---

This reading gives a high-level overview of available Ground Control Stations (GCS) and provides links for choosing an appropriate tool.

Read the ArduPilot guide:

<https://ardupilot.org/copter/docs/common-choosing-a-ground-station.html>

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
